title: Drupal
description: Drupal is an open-source content management framework for building websites, intranets and digital experiences.
installation: The official drupal image installs interactively via the web setup wizard on first run; complete the wizard at the app URL. On the database step choose PostgreSQL and enter host '{{KUBERO_APP_NAME}}-postgresql-rw', port 5432, database/user/password 'drupal' (rotate the postgres add-on credentials and the wizard admin password after setup). Drupal writes settings.php and uploaded files under /var/www/html/sites, which is persisted by the drupal-sites volume. For production, increase PHP memory_limit and the app pod size for large sites. No external object store or search engine is required for a base install (add Solr/Search API later if needed).
